stories.headline: Slovenia’s governing liberals face right-wing populists in tight election
stories.description: Voters choosing between incumbent PM Robert Golob and pro-Trump Janez Jansa, with neither likely to win a majority.

stories.headline: Iran war: What’s happening on day 23 of US-Israel attacks?
stories.description: Trump threatens to hit Iranian energy sites if the Strait of Hormuz is not reopened; Tehran vows to retaliate.

stories.headline: ‘I count their breaths’: A homeless mother protects her children in Delhi
stories.description: On a pavement in the Indian capital, Abida lost two children and watches over her other three night and day.

stories.headline: Italians are voting in a referendum on constitutional change
stories.description: The dry subject matter of this weekend's vote seems obscure but for many it is a vote on the PM.

stories.headline: ‘Can’t live like this’: Cuba hit by second nationwide blackout in a week
stories.description: Power grid collapses for a third time in March as the Cuban government battles a US-imposed oil blockade.
